disclaimers: Date is projected — if the 2025 coalition runs its full four-year term, the next Bundestagswahl is due in early 2029; a snap election cannot be ruled out.
Germany uses Mixed Member Proportional (MMP) with a 5% threshold — parties below 5% of the second vote receive no list seats.
Coalition dynamics shape outcomes as much as first-preference vote share — sentiment on coalition partners matters independently.
Regional strongholds (e.g. CSU in Bavaria, AfD/Linke in the east) mean national sentiment can mask decisive local swings.
